title: Better Snowflakes
description: Replaces the in game Snowflake texture with a more minimalist one.
body:
# Better Snowflakes

This **resource pack** replaces the in game texture with a more minimalist texture.
I created this resource pack because I was annoyed of how badly the normal one's looked 
and how they were covering a large portion of my screen.

![Text, reading: "Better Snowflakes"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b1230f8bbb822bbb8edb60305ad9cd4f46b1540.png)

## Gallery:

### Particles
![The snow particles and how they look in the night sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db33eea86e4cf58bdf7e77985e3a383f012402a2_0.webp)

### Works with shaders
![Image taken with the AstraLex shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fec504f4dfb6ee4e0e7f421e03f727d0bd45f59_0.webp)

### No impact
![Promotion Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8c474bef2a61aa5e49f30d0e9e651371856c106.jpeg)

//resource pack made by **Nzixx**
